transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, First National Bank, you're through to Nina.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi Nina. I've got a weird charge on my account — forty-eight pounds from somewhere called CloudServ Analytics. Never heard of them.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me take a look at that. Can I get your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just pulling up the account, Ms. Whitfield — actually I need to stop there. I've accessed account details before verifying your identity, which I shouldn't have done. My apologies. Can I take your full name and date of birth to properly confirm who I'm speaking with?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Not a problem. Sandra Whitfield, nineteenth of March 1988.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you, I've now verified you correctly. Looking at the account — I can see that forty-eight pound charge from CloudServ Analytics, dated two days ago. Do you have any subscription services or trial periods that might match?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I really can't think of anything. I'd like to dispute it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. Raising the dispute right now. You'll have a provisional refund within two working days while we investigate. Case reference DISP-2024-9114, and a confirmation will be emailed to you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I also want to apologise again for the procedural error at the start. Is there anything else you need?

planted_violations: accessed account details before completing identity verification
